name: Maple Sugar Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the milk to a boil.
2. Beat together 1 cup of maple sugar, flour, and eggs until the mixture is light and creamy.
3. Stir the egg mixture into the boiling milk and cook until the flour is thoroughly cooked.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Whip the remaining cream, then stir in the other cup of maple sugar.
6. Combine this with the cooked mixture and freeze.
